sub_mechanisms: M_1: collect a battery of self-referential prompts (predict-your-next-score on test set)
M_2: elicit model's predicted score for each
M_3: compute actual score via held-out evaluator
stripped_llm_application: Evaluation diagnostic that measures the gap between a model's self-predicted score on held-out tasks and its actual score, framed as an undefinability shadow.
stripping_rule_applied: removed: Tarski, undefinability, first-order, truth predicate
